t.div: You don't have any instances yet. Browse services to get started.

span.t-attf-class: badge rounded-pill #{ 'text-bg-success' if inst.state == 'running' else 'text-bg-info' if inst.state == 'provisioning' else 'text-bg-warning' if inst.state in ('pending_payment', 'paid', 'pending_provision') else 'text-bg-danger' if inst.state in ('failed', 'cancelled') else 'text-bg-secondary' }

t.t-value: invoices and any( inv.state == 'posted' and inv.payment_state not in ('paid', 'in_payment') and inv.amount_residual > 0 for inv in invoices )

span.t-attf-class: badge rounded-pill #{ 'text-bg-success' if instance.state == 'running' else 'text-bg-info' if instance.state == 'provisioning' else 'text-bg-warning' if instance.state in ('pending_payment', 'paid', 'pending_provision') else 'text-bg-danger' if instance.state in ('failed', 'cancelled') else 'text-bg-secondary' }

div.p: This usually takes a minute or two. The page will refresh automatically when ready.

button.onclick: return confirm('Are you sure you want to cancel this order?')

div.t-if: (instance.state == 'running' or backups) and not (instance.plan_id and instance.plan_id.is_trial_plan)

t.t-value: len([b for b in instance.backup_ids if b.state == 'done'])

div.small: You've reached your backup limit (/). Delete an old backup to create a new one.

button.title: Restore backup
button.onclick: return confirm('This will replace your current database and files with this backup. All current data will be lost. Are you sure?')
return confirm('Are you sure you want to delete this backup?')

div.p: No backups yet. Create your first backup to protect your data.

div.class: card shadow-sm border-0 mb-4 border-start border-4 border-warning

i.class: fa fa-credit-card fa-3x text-warning mb-3 d-block

div.p: You selected the plan. Complete payment to activate your upgrade.

div.class: card shadow-sm border-0 mb-4 border-start border-4 border-info

div.p: Your plan will switch to on . You keep your current plan until then.
After downgrading, depending on your current usage, you may experience slower performance or limitations in some operations. Consider optimizing your database for best experience.

div.t-if: instance.is_trial and instance.state == 'running' and not instance.pending_plan_id
div.class: card shadow-sm border-0 mb-4 border-start border-4 border-success

div.p: Your trial ends on . Subscribe to a paid plan before it expires to keep your instances running.

div.t-if: instance.is_trial and instance.state == 'suspended' and not instance.pending_plan_id

i.class: fa fa-exclamation-triangle fa-3x text-danger mb-3 d-block

div.p: Your free trial has ended. Subscribe to a paid plan to reactivate your instance.

i.class: fa fa-credit-card fa-3x text-warning mb-3 d-block

div.p: Your instance will be set up automatically once payment is confirmed.

a.t-if: instance.is_trial and instance.state in ('running', 'suspended') and not instance.pending_plan_id
not instance.is_trial and instance.state in ('running', 'stopped', 'suspended') and instance.plan_id and not instance.pending_plan_id and not instance.scheduled_plan_id

div.p: Upgrade to a paid plan. Your data and configuration will be preserved.

div.t-attf-class: card h-100 shadow-sm border-0 #{'border border-2 border-primary' if instance.plan_id.id == plan.id else ''}

t.t-out: int(plan.price) if plan.price == int(plan.price) else '%.2f' % plan.price
int(plan.yearly_price) if plan.yearly_price == int(plan.yearly_price) else '%.2f' % plan.yearly_price

div.p: No paid plans available at the moment. Please check back later.
Change to a different plan. Your data and configuration will be preserved.

t.t-out: int(plan.price) if plan.price == int(plan.price) else '%.2f' % plan.price
int(plan.yearly_price) if plan.yearly_price == int(plan.yearly_price) else '%.2f' % plan.yearly_price

div.span: Downgrade — at end of billing cycle

div.class: alert alert-success py-2 px-3 mb-3 price-monthly
div.div:
Credit applied:
for remaining days on your current plan

div.class: alert alert-success py-2 px-3 mb-3 price-yearly
div.div:
Credit applied:
for remaining days on your current plan

div.p: Your downgrade will take effect at the end of your current billing period (). No refunds or credits.
After downgrading, you may experience slower performance or limitations depending on your current usage.
No other plans available at the moment.
Review your order and proceed to payment.

t.div: Payment is not available. Please contact support.
